docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-25-2023 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MYADAM, SASIKIRAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NAVARETTE, MILTON $10,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,075.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$NO AMOUNT GIVEN) SERVED DEC-13-2022, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT NAVARETTE, MILTON
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY MYADAM, SASIKIRAN AS TO DEFENDANT NAVARETTE, MILTON ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-25-2023 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-25-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-25-2023 BY JUDGE MURLENE J. RANDLE. PLAINTIFF SASIKIRAN MYADAM IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MILTON NAVARETTE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT REQUESTS COURT FOR SPANISH INTERPRETER AND IS ASSISTED BY SPANISH COURT CERTIFIED INTERPRETER YOHANA VALLE #376919. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MURLENE J. RANDLE; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
